## Project Details
- Type: Next.js with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- Purpose: Luxury real estate website for a single agent
- Design: Modern, Apple-style clean interface with dark luxury accents (black, white, gold)

## Completed Steps
1. ✅ Created Next.js project structure with TypeScript
2. ✅ Configured Tailwind CSS with luxury theme
3. ✅ Created all pages: Home, Listings, About, Neighborhoods, Contact
4. ✅ Built reusable components (Header, Footer, PropertyCard)
5. ✅ Implemented home page sections (Hero, Stats, Featured Listings, Testimonials, CTA)
6. ✅ Added animations and transitions
7. ✅ Created README documentation
8. ✅ Installed all dependencies successfully
9. ✅ Development server running at http://localhost:3000
